title: rinorea cornigera
intro: Rinorea cornigera is a plant species belonging to the family Violaceae, commonly known as the violet family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Rinorea cornigera has been found to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Rinorea cornigera can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
